selected_scenario: Senior Manager, Digital Health Strategy — single-candidate calibrated evaluation council
synthetic_notice: All fixtures are SYNTHETIC lab data (BR-011). No real applicant data exists or is permitted in this repository.
approval_gaps: RESOLVED 2026-06-12 (was gap G-2): rub-smdh-001 v1 approved by the Product Owner as a synthetic/test-only rubric for Slice E1 lab evaluation. The approval is limited to synthetic fixture testing and does NOT imply production hiring approval.
No finished job posting existed in the source zip; job-posting.md is assembled verbatim from Sample-End-to-End-Hiring-Package.md sections 2-4 (gap G-1).
live_configuration_status: NO Azure, Blob Storage, Copilot Studio, Foundry, or Azure AI Search configuration has been performed. All *_usage fields describe intended future routing only.

po_decisions.decision: Approve rubric rub-smdh-001 v1 as a synthetic/test-only approved rubric for Slice E1 lab testing.
po_decisions.scope_limit: Synthetic fixture testing only; does not imply production hiring approval.

follow_ups: G-5 (implementation follow-up): register curated business fixture IDs in the runtime FixtureStore so the app/API can select the package by ID instead of relying only on inline document submission. No application logic changed as part of recording the PO decision.
